2606.29799.title: The CRISTAL Method: Neurosymbolic analysis from AI-synthesized world models
2606.29799.paper_summary: This project introduces the CRISTAL Method (Coherent Reliable Intentional Synthesis of Truthful Analysis Logic), a neurosymbolic framework for automating complex analysis workflows, with fundamental investment analysis as a primary use case. This domain poses major challenges: high structural uncertainty, noisy and subjective data, tight attention budgets, and the need for justified, reproducible decisions. Human analysts often struggle in this domain due to cognitive biases and limitations, suggesting significant value in automation. But while LLM-based agents have been proposed as analytical aids, their limitations -- poor numerical reasoning, unawareness of uncertainty, and lack of reproducibility -- hinder their effectiveness in this context. CRISTAL addresses these gaps through a principled blend of statistical model synthesis, continuous learning, and active learning. Starting from a natural-language prior knowledge curriculum, CRISTAL builds a dynamic, interpretable probabilistic program that enables full Bayesian inference, including uncertainty quantification and budget-aware data acquisition. CRISTAL continually refines its world model during analysis, leveraging LLMs for code synthesis and learning. We validate CRISTAL on a novel benchmark of synthetic equities with rich financial and textual data. On a company classification task, CRISTAL achieves Bayes-optimal accuracy with just 5 examples and a 5-second budget, outperforming state-of-the-art LLMs that plateau around 40\% accuracy even with order-of-magnitude more input data and compute.
2606.29799.paper_summary_zh: 這個項目介紹了CRISTAL方法（Coherent Reliable Intentional Synthesis of Truthful Analysis Logic），這是一個用於自動化複雜分析工作流程的神經符號框架，基本的投資分析是其主要用例。這個領域面臨著重大挑戰：高結構不確定性、嘈雜和主觀數據、緊張的注意預算，以及對有根據、可重複的決策的需求。人類分析師在這個領域中經常面臨認知偏見和限制，這表明自動化具有重要價值。但是，儘管基於LLM的代理被提出作為分析輔助工具，但它們的局限性——糟糕的數字推理、對不確定性的無知以及缺乏可重複性——在這個背景下妨礙了它們的有效性。CRISTAL通過原則性的統計模型合成、持續學習和主動學習來解決這些空白。從自然語言的先驗知識課程開始，CRISTAL構建了一個動態的、可解釋的概率程序，使其能夠進行全面的貝葉斯推斷，包括不確定性量化和考慮預算的數據獲取。CRISTAL在分析過程中不斷完善其世界模型，利用LLM進行代碼合成和學習。我們在一個具有豐富金融和文本數據的合成股票新基準上驗證了CRISTAL。在一個公司分類任務中，CRISTAL僅用5個樣本和5秒的預算就達到了貝葉斯最佳準確度，超越了即使在數量級更多的輸入數據和計算下也僅達到約40\%準確度的最先進LLM。
2606.29799.author: Rafael Kaufmann et.al.
2606.29799.authors: Rafael Kaufmann, Felix Neubürger, Michael Walters, Thomas Kopinski, Dimitrije Marković
